interpretation: The Polylogue report path now has a first-class headline detail mode that computes the physical and logical model-rollup totals without scanning provider-event, cumulative, sample, or stale-rollup diagnostics.
The remaining 45.59s devshell command latency is dominated by the Sinnix scope wrapper; bypassing that wrapper or invoking python -m polylogue runs the same headline command in about 5.3s.
The headline payload is intentionally caveated: it says full provider-event/stale diagnostics were not computed and directs users to detail=full for that audit.
